message:
🐛 Fix OAuth status showing "not configured" when user is logged in (#1258)

If the user is authenticated via GitHub OAuth, the developer panel should
show "OAuth configured" since they obviously logged in through it. Also
fix the health check to retry when the backend wasn't reachable instead
of permanently caching the failure.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
